title: An Act Regarding Retirement Benefits and Salary Adjustments for Judicial Employees
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 13, 2025
last_house_action: 4/15/2025 - Representative KUHN from the Committee on JUDICIARY Reporting that the Bill be REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR . Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/13/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on Judiciary suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY in concurrence
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.

Representative KUHN from the Committee on JUDICIARY Reporting that the Bill be REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR . Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED and the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR in concurrence
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
